subcodes.title: Words spoken at Paster Wagner's church in Paris, 1911-11-26
subcodes.first_line: I am deeply touched by the sympathetic words which have been addressed to me... All down the ages the prophets of God have been sent into the world to serve the cause of truth
subcodes.first_line_orig: جمیع مظاهر مقدسه خدمت بحقیقت فرمودند حضرت موسی ترویج حقیقه فرمود حضرت مسیح
subcodes.subjects: @progressive revelation; renewal of religion, @power of the mind over nature, @oneness; unity of religion, @war and peace, @materialism; material vs. spiritual civilization, @unity; oneness of humanity, @corruption and renewal; abandoning religious dogmas, @love of God
